plang.note: Hand-written .pr files, requires plang binary to run

coverage.note: All coder v6 changes have test coverage. One carry-forward gap: ResolveVariablesInPath cycle detection still untested.

resolved_from_v7.how: FromJson_DeeplyNested_Fails + distinct JsonDepthExceeded catch (though unreachable today).

findings.issue: ResolveVariablesInPath cycle detection ([ThreadStatic] HashSet) completely untested. Open since tester v7. If _resolvingVars.Add() check, finally cleanup, or isRoot cleanup were removed, no test fails.
findings.impact: Security feature with zero coverage. Circular variable references (%x% → %y% → %x%) could cause infinite loops if detection were removed.
findings.suggestion: Add tests: (a) circular reference terminates, (b) self-reference terminates, (c) after cycle, normal resolution still works.

findings.issue: Clr() depth limit not tested at boundary (20 OK, 21 fail). Open since tester v7.
JsonDepthExceeded catch is unreachable — STJ's MaxDepth (64) is hit before our limit (128). The error key has zero test coverage.
findings.impact: None today. Defensive code for future .NET changes.

carry_forward.issue: Thread safety concurrent test. Code correct but regression undetectable.
Inner context not propagated in RehydrateNestedData.

summary: 1390 C# tests pass. Coder v6 cross-concern fixes all verified (decimal precision, Clone context, fromJson error key, GetChild integration). 2 of 4 v7 findings resolved. Blocking: ResolveVariablesInPath cycle detection still has zero test coverage (open since v7). This is a security feature — if removed, no test detects the regression.
